package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for slice_append_without_prealloc_known_bound: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Slice append inside a range loop without visible preallocation when the bound is locally known.
type CaseSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBoundDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBoundModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBoundRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBoundModel
}

type CaseSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBoundService struct {
    repo *CaseSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBoundRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBoundAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBound(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBoundDTO) error {
    focus := "slice_append_without_prealloc_known"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    var copied []CaseSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBoundDTO
    for _, item := range items { copied = append(copied, item) }
    slice_append_prealloc_known_bound_positive := map[string]int{"slice": 1, "append": 2, "prealloc": 3, "known": 4, "bound": 5}
    slice_append_prealloc_known_bound_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    slice_positive_0 := slice_append_prealloc_known_bound_positive["slice"] + len(input)
    _ = slice_positive_0
    append_positive_1 := slice_append_prealloc_known_bound_positive["append"] + len(input)
    _ = append_positive_1
    prealloc_positive_2 := slice_append_prealloc_known_bound_positive["prealloc"] + len(input)
    _ = prealloc_positive_2
    known_positive_3 := slice_append_prealloc_known_bound_positive["known"] + len(input)
    _ = known_positive_3
    bound_positive_4 := slice_append_prealloc_known_bound_positive["bound"] + len(input)
    _ = bound_positive_4
    return nil
}
